name: WINNEBAGO INDUSTRIES INC
business: Winnebago Industries is a leading North American manufacturer of outdoor lifestyle products under the Winnebago, Grand Design, Chris-Craft, Newmar, and Barletta brands, used primarily in leisure travel and outdoor recreation. It also designs and manufactures advanced battery solutions for RVs, boats, specialty vehicles, and industrial applications. The company distributes its RV and marine products primarily through independent dealers in the U.S. and Canada, and marine products internationally.
sellsTo: Independent dealers in U.S. and Canada

exposures.sentence: We also design and manufacture advanced battery solutions that deliver house power, supporting internal electrical features and appliances for a variety of outdoor products including RVs, boats, specialty and other low-speed vehicles, as well as other industrial applications.

We may be subject to information technology system failures, inefficiencies associated with system implementations, network disruptions, and cybersecurity incidents that could adversely affect our business.
